entity.summary: Bitcoin-focused peer-to-peer decentralized exchange network that went into production in 2016 and remains active through Bisq 1 and Bisq 2.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. Launch marker uses the documented production date. Bisq 1 and Bisq 2 are not yet split into separate protocol or product records.

evidence.title: Phase Zero: A Plan for Bootstrapping the Bisq DAO
evidence.notes: First-party Bisq documentation states that the network went into production on April 19, 2016.

evidence.title: Bisq 2: Now in Beta
evidence.notes: Official announcement confirms Bisq 2 beta availability and states that Bisq 1 and Bisq 2 run alongside one another.

evidence.title: Bisq official network site
evidence.notes: Current official site provides active Bisq 1 and Bisq 2 downloads, documentation, and network resources.
